scope: AgenC diagnostics view ↔ openclaude src/components/DiagnosticsDisplay.tsx wholesale 1:1 port. AgenC's prior diagnostics/frame-monitor.ts (a runtime perf profiler with no openclaude equivalent) is deleted; the new DiagnosticsDisplay renders LSP-style diagnostic chat-message attachments. The transitive UI deps (MessageResponse, CtrlOToExpand) are also wholesale-ported; the heavier service/analytics transitive surface (DiagnosticTrackingService, Attachment union, getCwd, useShortcutDisplay, messageActions InVirtualListContext) is cherry-picked with the smallest viable subset that lets DiagnosticsDisplay compile.
transformationRules: extension-normalization, env-vars, brand-scrub, react-compiler-args, ts-expect-error: same family

requiredBehaviors: 1:1 wholesale copy post-transform; renders DiagnosticsAttachment.files into per-file headers + per-diagnostic Severity rows
AgenC's prior tui/diagnostics/frame-monitor.ts + frame-monitor.test.ts are deleted; main.tsx + state/FpsMetricsContext stripped of frame-monitor wiring
the component is wired but currently has no AgenC consumer — AgenC has no chat-attachment system yet; the wholesale port is in place for when AgenC introduces one
1:1 wholesale copy of openclaude src/components/MessageResponse.tsx post-transform
wraps child content with the dim-leading-corner glyph + Ratchet (AgenC has Ratchet in design-system)
MessageResponseContext provider/check unchanged
1:1 wholesale copy of openclaude src/components/CtrlOToExpand.tsx post-transform
consumes the cherry-picked InVirtualListContext from messageActions.tsx + useShortcutDisplay shim
renders the dim '(<shortcut> to expand)' hint outside virtualized lists
Cherry-pick: Diagnostic + DiagnosticFile types and DiagnosticTrackingService.getSeveritySymbol() — only the parts DiagnosticsDisplay consumes
rationale: openclaude's full file pulls MCP IDE-RPC + file-path normalization + slowOperations + analytics — product-runtime infrastructure that doesn't apply to AgenC
figures glyph constants are inlined to drop the openclaude figures-npm + env-detection transitive
Cherry-pick: only the `diagnostics` variant of openclaude's Attachment union
rationale: openclaude's full Attachment union has ~15 product-specific variants (file refs, plan-mode, PDF refs, …) AgenC doesn't have a chat-attachment surface for
expand the union as more openclaude components get wholesale-ported
Cherry-pick: getCwd() returning process.cwd()

rationale: openclaude's full file pulls AsyncLocalStorage + getCwdState + getOriginalCwd from bootstrap/state for per-context cwd-override semantics. AgenC doesn't need that today; if a future port introduces concurrent agents, port runWithCwdOverride from openclaude
Cherry-pick: thin React-hook wrapper around AgenC's static getShortcutDisplay(action, context, fallback)

rationale: openclaude's hook reads via useOptionalKeybindingContext().getDisplayText (different shape than AgenC's keybindings) and logs analytics events on fallback. AgenC has no analytics shim wired into the TUI; the cherry-pick drops the analytics-tracking effect
function signature matches openclaude byte-for-byte so wholesale-ported components can call it as the openclaude module would
Cherry-pick: only InVirtualListContext (a React boolean context) — consumed by the wholesale-ported CtrlOToExpand to suppress expand-hints inside virtualized lists
rationale: openclaude's full messageActions.tsx (~449 LOC) wires their RenderableMessage cursor + analytics events; AgenC's transcript layer has its own message-cursor system
the InVirtualListContext signature matches openclaude byte-for-byte
